targets.rawSql: SELECT t.ts AS time, t.irms_a, d.name AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.ts) ORDER BY t.ts
SELECT id, name, fw_version, last_seen, (now() - last_seen < interval '30 seconds') AS online FROM devices ORDER BY id
SELECT t.ts AS time, t.thd_pct, d.name AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE t.source='ct' AND $__timeFilter(t.ts) ORDER BY t.ts
SELECT ts, device_id, kind, detail, zscore FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT t.ts AS time, t.p_est_w, d.name || ' (' || t.source || ')' AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.ts) ORDER BY t.ts
